query:
UPDATE trades t1
JOIN (
  SELECT id, symbol, entry_price, quantity, recommendation
  FROM trades
  WHERE status = 'OPEN'
) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id
SET t1.status = 'CLOSED',
    t1.exit_price = t2.entry_price,
    t1.pnl = 0,
    t1.pnl_percent = 0,
    t1.closed_at = NOW();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 48pPh9xYP94hzUq.root --database 7RQABHEP2Bfkm28njawraw --execute UPDATE trades t1
JOIN (
  SELECT id, symbol, entry_price, quantity, recommendation
  FROM trades
  WHERE status = 'OPEN'
) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id
SET t1.status = 'CLOSED',
    t1.exit_price = t2.entry_price,
    t1.pnl = 0,
    t1.pnl_percent = 0,
    t1.closed_at = NOW();
